### JAP AI land production strategy v2
### This file consumes flags generated by the 15-day land production loop.
### ai_strategy value entries use fixed numbers; dynamic factory ratios are expanded into factory-count bands.

JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_baseline = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 10
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_mechanized_equipment_baseline = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_easy = yes
		JAP_has_cr_mechanized_equipment_design = yes
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = mechanized_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_amphibious_mechanized_equipment_baseline = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_easy = yes
		JAP_has_cr_amphibious_mechanized_equipment_design = yes
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = amphibious_mechanized_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_baseline_below_lunatic = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_chassis_design = yes
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = no
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_baseline_lunatic_plus = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_chassis_design = yes
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = yes
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 10
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_heavy_tank_chassis_baseline = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = yes
		JAP_has_cr_heavy_tank_chassis_design = yes
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = heavy_tank_chassis
		value = 10
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_modern_tank_chassis_baseline = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_easy = yes
		JAP_has_cr_modern_tank_chassis_design = yes
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_modern_tank_template_created
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = modern_tank_chassis
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_amphibious_chassis_baseline_below_lunatic = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_normal = yes
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_amphibious_chassis_design = yes
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = no
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_amphibious_chassis
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_amphibious_chassis_baseline_lunatic_plus = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 200
		Rance_nd_more_than_normal = yes
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_amphibious_chassis_design = yes
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = yes
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_amphibious_chassis
		value = 10
	}
}

	}
}

operations_equipment_management_JAP_motorized_equipment_increase = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		check_variable = {
			num_equipment@motorized_equipment < 0
		}
	}
	abort = {
		check_variable = {
			num_equipment@motorized_equipment > 2500
		}
	}

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = motorized_equipment
		value = 10
	}
}

operations_equipment_management_JAP_train_equipment_increase = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		check_variable = {
			num_equipment@train_equipment < 0
		}
	}
	abort = {
		check_variable = {
			num_equipment@train_equipment > 500
		}
	}

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = train_equipment
		value = 10
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase_100_299 = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase
		num_of_military_factories > 100
		NOT = { num_of_military_factories > 299 }
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 10
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase_300_699 = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase
		num_of_military_factories > 299
		NOT = { num_of_military_factories > 699 }
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 30
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase_700_plus = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_increase
		num_of_military_factories > 699
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 70
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_mechanized_equipment_increase_100_299 = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_mechanized_equipment_increase
		Rance_nd_more_than_easy = yes
		JAP_has_cr_mechanized_equipment_design = yes
		num_of_military_factories > 100
		NOT = { num_of_military_factories > 299 }
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = mechanized_equipment
		value = 10
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = mechanized_equipment
		value = 20
	}
}

	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP

	enable = {

		value = 30
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 40
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase_below_lunatic_300_699 = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_chassis_design = yes

		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 90
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 40
	}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase_below_lunatic_700_plus = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_chassis_design = yes

	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 210
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 40
	}
}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase_lunatic_plus_100_299 = {

		value = 15
	}

		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = medium_tank_chassis

}

JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase_lunatic_plus_700_plus = {
	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_medium_tank_chassis_increase
		JAP_has_cr_medium_tank_chassis_design = yes
		Rance_nd_more_than_hard = yes
		num_of_military_factories > 699
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 105
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = medium_tank_chassis
		value = 20
	}
}

	}
	enable = {
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis_increase
		JAP_has_cr_heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis_design = yes
		num_of_military_factories > 100
		NOT = { num_of_military_factories > 299 }
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis
		value = 10
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis
		value = 30
	}
}

	allowed = {
		original_tag = JAP
	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 100
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_infantry_equipment_decline
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_production_min_factories_archetype
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = -99
	}
	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = infantry_equipment
		value = -150
	}
}

	}
	enable = {
		num_of_military_factories > 100
		has_country_flag = JAP_ai_land_production_modern_tank_chassis_decline
	}
	abort_when_not_enabled = yes

	ai_strategy = {
		type = equipment_variant_production_factor
		id = modern_tank_chassis
		value = -75
	}
}
